summary: Iteration 2 testing completed successfully. ML models (irrigation RandomForest + drone UNet) are loading and working correctly - no longer using rule-based fallback. WebSocket ping-pong verified working internally. Dashboard shows 'Live (3s refresh)' badge. Farm Zones page loads with Upload Image button visible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All ML models working. Irrigation model returns 'Machine Learning (RandomForest)' in model_type. Drone model processes images and returns zone segmentation. WebSocket endpoint responds to ping with pong.

websocket_endpoint.note: External ingress may give 502 for WebSocket, use internal test

mocked_apis.note: Both ML models (irrigation_model.pkl and final_drone_model.pth) are now REAL - no longer mocked. Rule-based fallback exists as safety net but not being used.
